generated_code:
import re


def checkNumber(number):
    '''
    Use regular expression to match lines with numbers
    '''
    # Split input into lines and filter those containing at least one digit
    lines = number.splitlines()
    # Pattern to match any digit in a line
    pattern = r'\d'
    # Return list of lines that contain at least one digit
    return [line for line in lines if re.search(pattern, line)]

codeql_results.message: Cross-site scripting vulnerability due to a [user-provided value](1).

findings.cwe_name: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
findings.description: Potential XSS vulnerability in regex pattern handling due to untrusted input processing at line 21
findings.remediation_code: Use re.escape() on user-provided input before regex operations
findings.remediation_description: Escape special regex characters in user input to prevent pattern injection

report.recommendation: Validate CodeQL finding through dynamic testing and implement input sanitization

patch_feedback.priority: Verify CodeQL finding with sandbox testing before prioritization
